title: Withdraw Response
description: Transaction status for the withdrawal. Withdrawals start as `pending` and eventually move to `complete`, `rejected`, or `failed`.

status.description: Current status of the transaction. Withdrawals start as `pending`.

transaction_id.description: Identifier of the transaction. May be null while the withdrawal is pending. If you supplied a `request_id`, use the withdrawal status endpoint to track its status independently.

metadata.description: Request metadata included in every response.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

timing.description: Time in seconds for the service to process the request.
